encounter.ancient_inheritance.title: Ancient Cultivator's Legacy
encounter.ancient_inheritance.flavor: An ancient will awakens in Wang Lin's meridians — power from before Chu Tước Star flows in.
encounter.hidden_cave.title: Hidden Ghost Cave
encounter.hidden_cave.flavor: Spirit veins glitter in the dark. Wang Lin absorbs essence — spirit stones and insight.
encounter.spirit_beast.title: Little White
encounter.spirit_beast.flavor: A fox spirit watches from Ghost Spirit Mountain's fog… then chooses to walk beside Wang Lin.
encounter.forgotten_memory.title: Wang Family Memory
encounter.forgotten_memory.flavor: The burned village returns — an unkept promise from the day Heng Yue rejected me.
encounter.ancient_sword.title: Heaven Reverse Sword
encounter.ancient_sword.flavor: A blade sleeps in stone on Ghost Spirit Mountain. Wang Lin touches it — the seal breaks; Heaven Reverse answers reverse-heaven qi.
encounter.secret_manual.title: Fire Burn Manual
encounter.secret_manual.flavor: Pages fall from a Fire Burn demonic cultivator — a flame technique Wang Lin has never learned.
encounter.destiny_cave.title: Destiny's Crossroad
encounter.destiny_cave.flavor: The road forks. Wang Lin feels three paths ahead — each a thread the heavens may weave into his fate. Cơ duyên stirs.
item.sword.ancient.name: Heaven Reverse Sword
item.sword.ancient.desc: Heaven Reverse — cultivate against heaven. An ancient blade sealed in stone, answering only Wang Lin's will.
